rationale: Fixture output that mimics an Anthropic tool-use response for a code-review Harnessfile.

manifest.name: Model Fixture: Anthropic Code Review
manifest.objective: Review a pull request with dry-run evidence and approval gates.

capability_packs.description: Read repository diffs, tests, docs, and prior ledger evidence.
Draft review findings and follow-up issues without publishing changes.

executors.purpose: Draft a review tracking issue before any live publication.

inputs.issue_body: Track review scope, findings, approval, and required evidence.

executors.purpose: Plan a Claude review pass without posting comments.

inputs.system: Draft concise code-review findings with evidence. Do not post comments.

evals.description: The generated ledger must be ordered and readable.
Adapters must leave required dry-run evidence.
Risky actions need human approval evidence before execution.

metadata.trust_boundary: Model proposes; Delegation Bot validates, plans, writes ledger evidence, and requires approval.

safety_notes: The fixture must not call Anthropic.
The draft may propose a Harnessfile but cannot approve or execute it.
Review comments or issues still require the normal gates before live writes.
validation_expectations: The manifest validates with the deterministic Harnessfile validator.
The manifest compiles into a dry-run plan.
The ledger is written only by Delegation Bot planning code.
